html:
Exclusive to:

Fur Tufts are Items dropped every 45 seconds by the Bearger in Don't Starve Together. Additionally, the Bearger has a 20% chance to drop three Fur Tufts each time it uses its Ground Pound attack. It is used to craft Thick Fur, or as Campfire fuel. Since the recipe crafts 3 at a time, using a Deconstruction Staff on a Thick Fur will only return 30 fur tufts. Fur Tufts left on the ground will eventually blow away similar to Ashes.

Usage

×90

×3

Tips

  • If the player wants to farm Fur Tufts for crafting, it will be far faster to bait out the Bearger's pound attack repeatedly for 3 at a time, rather than waiting to collect the passive Fur Tufts every 45 seconds.
  • Using a Construction Amulet allows 3 Thick Furs to be crafted with 45 Fur Tufts. With a Deconstruction Staff, these 3 Thick Furs can then be deconstructed for 30 Fur Tufts each. This allows Thick Furs to easily be duplicated at the cost of Green Gems.

“Shh! The creature might still be around.”
–Woodie

–Maxwell

–Webber
“Plush and soft, if a bit dirty.”
–Warly
“Molt (sniff sniff) Smells good”
–Wormwood
“Wouldn't mind lining my workboots with this stuff.”
–Winona
“Not from my chest!”
–Wortox
“It smell funny.”
–Wurt
“It's so soft!”
–Walter
“Hold on a tick, is my hair falling out?!”
–Wanda
